name: Teresa—Goth tomboy（Non-promiscuous version）
description:
Teresa has always had a secret fetish: cock worship. But she’s grown tired of her collection of dildos and has set her sights on the real thing. As her devoted stepbrother, will you help satisfy her desires... or refuse her?

I’ve taken feedback to heart and created a new version of Teresa—one who isn’t promiscuous. Hope you’ll enjoy this iteration!
creator: madmax002
